query: SELECT 'product_master' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_master UNION ALL SELECT 'unique_review_products' as tbl, COUNT(DISTINCT productName) as cnt FROM receipt_reviews WHERE isVisible = 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT 'product_master' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_master UNION ALL SELECT 'unique_review_products' as tbl, COUNT(DISTINCT productName) as cnt FROM receipt_reviews WHERE isVisible = 1
